title: Tirupati Divine Darshan
description: Experience the divine grace of Lord Venkateswara with our premium Tirupati package. Includes VIP darshan, comfortable AC transport from Vizag, and stay at a handpicked hotel near Tirumala hills.
mapTeaser: Sacred abode of Lord Venkateswara atop the seven hills of Tirumala.

itinerary.title: Departure from Vizag
itinerary.desc: Board AC sleeper bus from Vizag. Overnight journey with dinner en route.

itinerary.title: VIP Darshan at Tirumala
itinerary.desc: Early morning VIP darshan at Tirumala temple. Visit Padmavathi Temple. Check into hotel. Evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Return to Vizag
itinerary.desc: Breakfast at hotel. Visit Kapila Theertham. Depart for Vizag with memories and blessings.

title: Varanasi Spiritual Journey
description: Witness the timeless Ganga Aarti, explore ancient temples, and cruise the sacred ghats of Kashi. A soul-stirring journey through India's spiritual capital.
mapTeaser: The eternal city of light — where the sacred Ganges meets ancient tradition.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Varanasi
itinerary.desc: Flight from Vizag. Airport transfer, check-in at 4-star hotel. Evening Ganga Aarti.

itinerary.title: Sunrise Boat Ride & Temples
itinerary.desc: Sunrise boat ride on the Ganges. Visit Kashi Vishwanath Temple, Annapurna Temple.

itinerary.title: Sarnath Excursion
itinerary.desc: Day trip to Sarnath — where Buddha gave his first sermon. Museum and ruins.

itinerary.title: Cultural Varanasi
itinerary.desc: Explore silk weaving centers, Banaras Hindu University, and evening at ghats.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Breakfast and airport transfer. Return flight to Vizag.

title: Hyderabad Heritage & Devotion
description: Explore the City of Pearls — from the iconic Charminar to the serene Birla Mandir. Savor legendary Hyderabadi biryani and shop at Laad Bazaar.
mapTeaser: The City of Pearls — iconic Charminar, royal heritage, and legendary cuisine.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Old City
itinerary.desc: Arrive in Hyderabad. Visit Charminar, Laad Bazaar. Authentic biryani dinner.

itinerary.title: Temples & Film City
itinerary.desc: Morning at Birla Mandir. Full day at Ramoji Film City.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.desc: Visit Golconda Fort. Depart for Vizag.

title: Vizag Temple & Coastal Tour
description: Discover the jewel of the East Coast — from the sacred Simhachalam Temple to the stunning Araku Valley.
mapTeaser: Jewel of the East Coast — beaches, temples, and the breathtaking Araku Valley.

itinerary.title: Temple & Beaches
itinerary.desc: Simhachalam Temple, Kailasagiri Ropeway, RK Beach, Submarine Museum.

itinerary.title: Araku Valley
itinerary.desc: Full-day Araku Valley trip. Borra Caves, coffee plantations. Return evening.

title: Rishikesh Adventure Escape
description: Conquer the rapids of the Ganges, trek through Himalayan trails, and find your zen in the Yoga Capital of the World.
mapTeaser: Yoga Capital of the World — white-water rapids and Himalayan adventures.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Camp Setup
itinerary.desc: Arrive in Rishikesh. Transfer to riverside camp. Evening bonfire.

itinerary.title: River Rafting
itinerary.desc: 16km Grade 3-4 rapids. Cliff jumping. Beach volleyball.

itinerary.title: Bungee & Trekking
itinerary.desc: Bungee jumping at Jumpin Heights. Afternoon nature trek.

itinerary.title: Beatles Ashram & Yoga
itinerary.desc: Visit Beatles Ashram. Sunrise yoga session. Laxman Jhula.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Morning at leisure. Transfer to airport/station.

title: Goa Beach Paradise
description: Sun, sand, and spectacular sunsets. Explore pristine beaches, Portuguese heritage, vibrant nightlife, and world-class seafood.
mapTeaser: India's sunshine state — golden beaches, Portuguese charm, and vibrant nightlife.

itinerary.title: Arrival & North Goa
itinerary.desc: Flight to Goa. Check-in at beachfront resort. Evening at Baga Beach.

itinerary.title: Water Sports & Beaches
itinerary.desc: Parasailing, jet ski, banana ride. Visit Anjuna and Vagator beaches.

itinerary.title: South Goa & Heritage
itinerary.desc: Old Goa churches. Spice plantation tour. Palolem Beach sunset.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Breakfast. Last-minute shopping at flea market. Airport transfer.

title: Manali Snow & Mountains
description: Breathe in the crisp mountain air, drive through the legendary Rohtang Pass, and witness snow-capped peaks.
mapTeaser: Himalayan paradise — snow-capped peaks, pine forests, and mountain adventures.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Manali
itinerary.desc: Overnight Volvo from Delhi. Scenic journey through mountains.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Local Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Check-in. Visit Hadimba Temple, Vashisht Hot Springs. Mall Road evening.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley
itinerary.desc: Adventure day — paragliding, zorbing, skiing (seasonal). Snow activities.

itinerary.title: Rohtang Pass
itinerary.desc: Full-day Rohtang Pass excursion. Snow point. Stunning views.

itinerary.title: Kullu & Manikaran
itinerary.desc: Kullu river rafting. Hot springs at Manikaran Gurudwara.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Breakfast. Depart by Volvo to Delhi.

title: Dubai Luxury Experience
description: Live the dream in the city of gold. From the Burj Khalifa observation deck to a desert safari under the stars.
mapTeaser: City of Gold — futuristic skyline, desert safaris, and unmatched luxury.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Dubai
itinerary.desc: Airport transfer. Hotel check-in. Evening at Dubai Marina Walk.

itinerary.title: Burj Khalifa & Dubai Mall
itinerary.desc: At the Top observation deck. Dubai Mall, Aquarium, Fountain Show.

itinerary.title: Desert Safari
itinerary.desc: Dune bashing, camel riding, sandboarding. BBQ dinner under stars.

itinerary.title: City Tour & Dhow Cruise
itinerary.desc: Old Dubai, Gold Souk, Spice Souk. Evening Dhow Cruise dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Morning shopping at Mall of Emirates. Airport transfer.

title: Thailand Tropical Bliss
description: From the glittering temples of Bangkok to the tropical beaches of Pattaya — the Land of Smiles awaits.
mapTeaser: Land of Smiles — golden temples, tropical islands, and vibrant street life.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bangkok
itinerary.desc: Airport transfer. Check-in. Evening at Khao San Road.

itinerary.title: Bangkok Temples
itinerary.desc: Grand Palace, Wat Pho, Wat Arun. River boat tour.

itinerary.title: Floating Market & Transfer
itinerary.desc: Damnoen Saduak Floating Market. Transfer to Pattaya.

itinerary.title: Pattaya Beaches
itinerary.desc: Coral Island, water sports, parasailing. Walking Street evening.

itinerary.title: Nong Nooch & Massage
itinerary.desc: Nong Nooch Garden. Traditional Thai massage. Shopping.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Bangkok airport. Return flight.

title: Bali Island Paradise
description: Discover the Island of the Gods. From emerald rice terraces to sacred water temples — a visual feast.
mapTeaser: Island of the Gods — emerald rice terraces, sacred temples, and paradise beaches.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bali
itinerary.desc: Airport transfer. Private villa check-in. Welcome dinner.

itinerary.title: Ubud Culture
itinerary.desc: Tegallalang Rice Terraces, Monkey Forest, Ubud Art Market.

itinerary.title: Water Temples
itinerary.desc: Tirta Empul purification. Tirta Gangga water palace.

itinerary.title: Nusa Penida Island
itinerary.desc: Boat trip. Kelingking Beach, Angel's Billabong, snorkeling.

itinerary.title: Beach & Spa Day
itinerary.desc: Seminyak Beach. Full-day traditional Balinese spa treatment.

itinerary.title: Uluwatu Sunset
itinerary.desc: Uluwatu Temple. Kecak fire dance. Jimbaran seafood dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Breakfast. Souvenir shopping. Airport transfer.

title: Singapore City Marvel
description: Experience the Garden City's perfect blend of futuristic architecture, lush gardens, and world-class cuisine.
mapTeaser: The Garden City — futuristic marvels, lush gardens, and culinary perfection.

itinerary.title: Arrival
itinerary.desc: Airport transfer. Check-in. Evening at Marina Bay light show.

itinerary.title: City Highlights
itinerary.desc: Gardens by the Bay, Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, Merlion Park.

itinerary.title: Sentosa Island
itinerary.desc: Universal Studios Singapore. S.E.A. Aquarium. Cable car ride.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Chinatown and Little India. Shopping at Orchard Road. Airport.

title: Kedarnath Sacred Yatra
description: Embark on the ultimate Himalayan pilgrimage to the sacred Kedarnath Temple, nestled at 11,755 ft. Trek through stunning mountain trails and experience divine serenity.
mapTeaser: Sacred Himalayan shrine — Lord Shiva's abode at 11,755 feet amidst eternal snows.

itinerary.title: Vizag to Delhi
itinerary.desc: Flight to Delhi. Overnight transfer to Haridwar.

itinerary.title: Haridwar to Guptkashi
itinerary.desc: Drive to Guptkashi via Rishikesh, Devprayag. Check-in at lodge.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kedarnath
itinerary.desc: Drive to Gaurikund. 16km trek to Kedarnath. Evening at temple.

itinerary.title: Kedarnath Darshan
itinerary.desc: Early morning darshan at Kedarnath Temple. Visit Bhairavnath Temple.

itinerary.title: Descent & Return
itinerary.desc: Trek back to Gaurikund. Drive to Rishikesh. Evening Ganga Aarti.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Morning at Rishikesh. Transfer to Delhi. Return flight to Vizag.

title: Puri Jagannath Pilgrimage
description: Visit the legendary Jagannath Temple in Puri — one of the Char Dham. Explore the golden beach, Konark Sun Temple, and Chilika Lake.
mapTeaser: Home of Lord Jagannath — ancient Char Dham, golden beaches, and timeless devotion.

itinerary.title: Vizag to Puri
itinerary.desc: AC train to Puri. Check-in at beachside hotel. Evening at Puri Beach.

itinerary.title: Jagannath Temple
itinerary.desc: VIP darshan at Jagannath Temple. Visit Gundicha Temple. Evening at beach.

itinerary.title: Konark & Chilika
itinerary.desc: Morning at Konark Sun Temple. Afternoon boat ride at Chilika Lake.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.desc: Morning shopping for souvenirs. AC train back to Vizag.

title: Maldives Island Luxury
description: Escape to paradise in the Maldives. Crystal-clear turquoise waters, overwater villas, world-class snorkeling, and unforgettable sunsets.
mapTeaser: Paradise on Earth — turquoise lagoons, overwater villas, and pristine coral reefs.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Malé
itinerary.desc: Flight to Malé. Speedboat transfer to resort. Overwater villa check-in.

itinerary.title: Ocean Adventures
itinerary.desc: Morning snorkeling at coral reef. Afternoon kayaking. Sunset cruise.

itinerary.title: Diving & Relaxation
itinerary.desc: Scuba diving excursion. Afternoon spa treatment. Beach dinner.

itinerary.title: Island Hopping
itinerary.desc: Visit local island. Dolphin watching cruise. Farewell dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Sunrise yoga. Breakfast. Speedboat to Malé. Return flight.

title: Sri Lanka Heritage Trail
description: Discover the Pearl of the Indian Ocean — from the ancient Sigiriya Rock Fortress to lush tea plantations and pristine southern beaches.
mapTeaser: Pearl of the Indian Ocean — ancient fortresses, tea hills, and golden coastlines.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Colombo
itinerary.desc: Flight to Colombo. Transfer to Negombo. City walk and dinner.

itinerary.title: Sigiriya & Dambulla
itinerary.desc: Climb Sigiriya Rock Fortress. Visit Dambulla Cave Temple.

itinerary.title: Kandy
itinerary.desc: Drive to Kandy. Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic. Cultural dance show.

itinerary.title: Tea Country
itinerary.desc: Train ride to Nuwara Eliya. Tea plantation tour. Colonial town walk.

itinerary.title: Galle & Beaches
itinerary.desc: Drive to Galle. Dutch Fort. Beach relaxation at Unawatuna.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Colombo airport. Return flight.
